creator: rick@wzoeterwoude.net
text:
trying to receive http://portsnap3.FreeBSD.org./latest.ssl from the portsnap mirror results into an 404 not found error.

Fix: 

* http://portsnap3.FreeBSD.org./latest.ssl is giving problems http://portsnap3.FreeBSD.org/latest.ssl (without dot) is working file. A simple (apache) webserver reconfigure should fixed the problem to also allow the portsnap3.FreeBSD.org. domain.
How-To-Repeat: * Hard code server portsnap3.FreeBSD.org. into /etc/portsnap.conf (mind the dot on the end)
* Run `portsnap fetch`
* You will get the error:

fetch: http://portsnap3.FreeBSD.org./latest.ssl: Not Found
Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... using portsnap3.FreeBSD.org.
Fetching snapshot tag... failed.
